text: CT Sales Tax Permit Number: ___________________________________ (not your SSN, not other states)
If you need help obtaining one, contact: No applications will be accepted without a CT Sales Tax Permit Number.
It is REQUIRED that you have a CT Sales Tax Permit to participate in the show and it sellerpermit.com/State/CT.aspx
must be displayed in your booth.
The Ridgefield Woman’s Club Craft Fair is a juried show. This craft fair is restricted to handcrafted or hand-
embellished items made by the participating crafters who must be in attendance at the show. No manufactured
goods, items made from kits, or items that are produced outside of the United States are permitted. Only the items
you have described in this application may be sold at the show.
Please check the primary category that describes your craft. The number of crafters per category is limited.
__ Art Work __Florals __ Crafted Jewelry __ Assembled Jewelry __ Photography
DESCRIBE HOW YOU MAKE YOUR CRAFTED ITEMS
Please describe materials and how you make the items you will bring to the RWC Craft Fair
What is the price range of your crafted items?______________________
PLEASE PICK YOUR DISPLAY SPACE OF CHOICE
Mark your #1 and #2 requested location choice and booth size and note prices.
There are limited spaces with Electricity, so these are assigned first come first served.
9’x12’ Inside – 10’x11’ Wall – NO electricity available With Electricity ($135) or ($150)
Will you be providing food samples: Yes No
If you are providing food samples, you apply for a space in the cafeteria. must
(It is the only place where open containers of food are permitted as per facility rules.)
If possible, would you like the same location as last year? (we will do our best but no guarantees) Yes_____ No _____
IMPORTANT: We regret that we cannot accommodate tents or canopies nor supply hand trucks, dollies or
other equipment to move merchandise or displays. If you paid for electricity, only UL listed, heavy-duty
extension cords with three-prong grounding plugs are acceptable. No storage space is available except the
space within the boundaries of your booth. We also cannot supply tables, chairs, lights, electrical cords or
any other items to setup your booth. Please bring all needed supplies with you, including enough cash to
East Ridge Middle School, 10 East Ridge Road, Ridgefield. EVENT LOCATION: Please do not contact the school.
MAIL YOUR COMPLETED APPLICATION TO: RWC Craft Fair, PO Box 66, Ridgefield, CT 06877
For RENEWAL Crafters-please mail (not email) your completed application to us, accompanied by your check
payable to RWC. For all NEW Crafters- in addition to above, please send three (3) pictures of your craft including
one (1) showing you making your craft. Applications will not be juried unless accompanied by payment and
Your payment check will not be cashed until you are accepted and confirmed to participate in the show. If you photos.
are not accepted by our jury, your check will be returned. No refunds will be made for cancellations - for any reason -
For further information or questions, please contact us via email: rwc.craftfair@gmail.com
All proceeds of the show are donated to other not-for-profit organizations in Ridgefield and surrounding communities.
